mapper.sql: select id, task_name, bid_id, framework_id, bid_file_id, source_module, status, total_count, issue_count, start_time, finish_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag from tdw_quality_task
mapper.insert: insert into tdw_quality_task(task_name, bid_id, framework_id, bid_file_id, source_module, status, total_count, issue_count, start_time, finish_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag) values(#{taskName}, #{bidId}, #{frameworkId}, #{bidFileId}, #{sourceModule}, #{status}, #{totalCount}, #{issueCount}, #{startTime}, #{finishTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark}, #{delFlag})
mapper.delete:
update tdw_quality_task set del_flag = '2', update_time = now() where id in
#{id}
